role: Hosts the lock worker script for managing distributed file-based locks.
responsibility: Provides a CLI tool for acquiring and releasing locks, supporting three operational modes (acquire-release, acquire-hold, acquire-release-rewrite), handling process signals for graceful shutdown, emitting JSON output for parent process communication, and maintaining hold-open timers.

children.role: Implementation of a lock worker script for managing file-based distributed locks in the ArchSpine system.
